heroHeadline: Ukraine Deploys War Robots and Autonomous Drones to Front Lines in Growing Numbers
heroSubtitle: Unmanned ground vehicles and autonomous drone systems mark a new phase of automated battlefield tactics as Ukraine reduces troop exposure along contact lines
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
